title: LangGraph-Native DecisionGraph + Studio Adapter
context: T007 refactors only DecisionGraph into a LangGraph-native StateGraph and exposes it through LangGraph Studio while preserving T006 CLI JSON contracts. It does not build a custom workflow UI or migrate OutcomeGraph/EvaluationGraph/InsightExplorationGraph.

steps.description: Spec gate: confirm T007 source-of-truth, T006 contract preservation, and forbidden-scope boundaries.
steps.exit_criteria: A reviewer can prove T007 only changes native DecisionGraph and preserves T006 CLI/run_id contracts.

steps.description: Studio config and dependency foundation: add exact langgraph.json shape plus LangGraph CLI/checkpointer dependencies. Do not require Studio load until S2.
steps.exit_criteria: langgraph.json has dependencies ["."], only decision_graph, and env ../../.env; dependencies are installed without adding UI code.

steps.description: DecisionGraph native state and nodes: move the business flow into LangGraph StateGraph nodes, keep runDecisionGraph as adapter, and satisfy Studio load-only smoke.
steps.exit_criteria: DecisionGraph behavior remains equivalent while the business flow is owned by the compiled StateGraph; Studio can load decision_graph without direct real-persistence.

steps.description: Run registry and checkpointer boundary: preserve run_id, use thread_id = run_id, expose bounded runs show metadata, and remove fake full-state checkpoints from native DecisionGraph.
steps.exit_criteria: runs list/show/resume keep run_id contract, use thread_id = run_id, and return bounded metadata without full native graph state.

steps.description: CLI, Studio, docs, and forbidden-scope verification.
steps.exit_criteria: CLI smoke, Studio smoke, tests, docs, and scope audit prove T007 stayed inside DecisionGraph-native refactor boundaries.
